_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: the SVZ of the three Type 2 cases with near-2N/Pten/chr19-normal tumor cells was free of high-grade gliomas, and some cases, except for increased numbers of Olig2+ cells, resembled a normal SVZ stem-cell niche
details: Successfully detected Olig2+ cells in tumor tissue sections and identified increased numbers of Olig2+ cells in SVZ regions
